hero.title: Meng Wen
hero.subtitle: Product Designer and Digital Practitioner
hero.description: I turn complex workflows into clearer experiences, aligning design, business, and delivery within one shared rhythm.
hero.fact.1.label: Focus
hero.fact.2.label: Method
hero.fact.3.label: Tone
about.title: Design is not only screens. It is also flow, collaboration, and delivery.
about.lead: I work across dental care and digital operations, connecting product, service, and experience.
about.body: From requirement framing to information architecture and execution, I care not only about how an interface looks, but how a system helps people understand, collaborate, and move.
about.point.1: Translate complex business into clear user experience
about.point.2: Build alignment and pace across multi-role scenarios
about.point.3: Balance design quality with delivery reality
experience.title: Across design, product, and business operations.
experience.intro: My role is often closer to organizing clarity inside complexity than producing visuals in isolation.
experience.item.1.title: Working close to real dental workflows
experience.item.1.body: I map diagnosis, screening, membership, and checkout flows into experience decisions that teams can actually execute.
experience.item.2.title: Driving digital products into practice
experience.item.2.body: I turn requirements, roles, and information flow into clearer structures so teams can align faster and iterate with confidence.
experience.item.3.title: Making complex content easier to understand
experience.item.3.body: Whether interface, case study, or internal material, I focus on structure, pacing, and communication efficiency.
portfolio.title: A few directions that reflect how I work.
portfolio.intro: These are presented as directional entries for now and can later expand into full case studies.
portfolio.item.1.title: Member automation and service continuity
portfolio.item.1.body: Connecting membership logic, promotion, and service flow to reduce manual switching and information gaps.
portfolio.item.2.title: Orthodontic screening and status management
portfolio.item.2.body: Turning screening, follow-up, and status transitions into a clearer operational loop.
portfolio.item.3.title: Structured expression for complex information
portfolio.item.3.body: Organizing plans, reporting, and project material into formats that are easier to read, advance, and reuse.
contact.title: If you are improving experience inside a complex business, we should talk.
contact.body: A good fit for conversations about product experience, service flow, digital collaboration, and making complex problems easier to act on.
